rules.reasoning: Sentinel catch-all rule: any Tesla VIN with modelYear < 2020 predates HW4. Phase 2 determineHw4() must check modelYear === 0 and apply this rule to all parsed years < 2020. HW1/HW2/HW2.5 era.
Sentinel catch-all: Model S pre-2020 is HW1/HW2/HW2.5/HW3 — never HW4.
Sentinel catch-all: Model 3 pre-2020 is HW2.5/HW3 — never HW4.
Sentinel catch-all: Model X pre-2020 is HW2.5/HW3 — never HW4.
Cybertruck (WMI 7G2, Austin plant) launched with HW4 in November 2023 as MY2024. All Cybertruck VINs are HW4. Fast-path in Phase 2: if model === Cybertruck return yes immediately.
Cybertruck MY2025 continues HW4. All Cybertruck VINs are HW4 by design.
Cybertruck MY2026 continues HW4. All Cybertruck VINs are HW4.
Model Y Fremont MY2020 (VIN year char L): all units shipped with HW3. HW4 did not exist in production in 2020.
Model Y Fremont MY2021 (year char M): all units are HW3. No HW4 in production.
Model Y Fremont MY2022 (year char N): all units are HW3. HW4 rollout did not begin until 2023.
Model Y Fremont MY2023: serials below 789,425 are definitively HW3. Community serial cutoff ~789,500; widened by -75 per conservative policy. LOW confidence: community-sourced only.
Model Y Fremont MY2023: serial range 789,425–789,575 is the HW3/HW4 transition boundary. Community cutoff ~789,500 ±75. Check Controls > Software > Additional Vehicle Information.
Model Y Fremont MY2023: serials above 789,575 are definitively HW4. Community cutoff ~789,500 widened +75.
Model Y Fremont MY2024: entire year is HW4. The HW3/HW4 transition at Fremont completed during MY2023 production.
Model Y Fremont MY2025: HW4 standard. All units manufactured with HW4.
Model Y Fremont MY2026: HW4 expected to continue. No evidence of hardware change. MEDIUM confidence as MY2026 is very recent production.
Model Y Shanghai (LRW WMI) MY2020: HW3. Giga Shanghai Model Y production began 2021 for domestic; 2020 units are HW3.
Model Y Shanghai MY2021: all HW3. HW4 not in Shanghai production yet.
Model Y Shanghai MY2022: all HW3. HW4 rollout began at Shanghai in 2023.
Model Y Shanghai MY2023: whole-year maybe. No reliable serial-range cutoff data exists for Shanghai MY2023 Model Y. Some early 2023 units may be HW3, later units may be HW4. Check Software screen.
Model Y Shanghai MY2024: Tesla China announced Feb 1, 2024 that all new deliveries include HW4 standard. MEDIUM confidence: primary announcement not directly verified from an archived source.
Model Y Shanghai MY2025: HW4 continues post-Feb 2024 announcement. MEDIUM confidence.
Model Y Shanghai MY2026: HW4 continues. MEDIUM confidence as very recent production.
Model Y Berlin (XP7 WMI) MY2022: Giga Berlin opened March 2022 with HW3. All 2022 Berlin Model Y units are HW3.
Model Y Berlin MY2023: all HW3. HW4 rollout at Berlin had not begun for standard deliveries by end of MY2023.

Model Y Berlin MY2024: locked as maybe. A confirmed April 2024 delivery from Giga Berlin carried HW3 despite being MY2024. Mixed HW3/HW4 deliveries occurred throughout 2024. Check Controls > Software > Additional Vehicle Information.
Model Y Berlin MY2025: expected to be HW4 standard by 2025 production. MEDIUM confidence — Berlin transition timeline is less well-documented than Fremont.
Model Y Berlin MY2026: HW4 continues. MEDIUM confidence as very recent production.
Model Y Austin (7SA WMI, some Fremont 5YJ also covers Austin) MY2022: Giga Texas opened April 2022 with HW3. All 2022 Austin Model Y units are HW3.
Model Y Austin MY2023: serials below 131,125 are definitively HW3. Community cutoff ~131,200 widened -75. LOW confidence: community-sourced only.
Model Y Austin MY2023: serial range 131,125–131,275 is the HW3/HW4 boundary zone. Community cutoff ~131,200 ±75. Check Controls > Software > Additional Vehicle Information.
Model Y Austin MY2023: serials above 131,275 are definitively HW4. Community cutoff ~131,200 widened +75.
Model Y Austin MY2024: entire year is HW4. Transition at Giga Texas completed during MY2023.
Model Y Austin MY2025: HW4 standard. All units manufactured with HW4.
Model Y Austin MY2026: HW4 continues. MEDIUM confidence as very recent production.
Model 3 Fremont (5YJ WMI) MY2020: all HW3. HW4 did not exist in production in 2020.
Model 3 Fremont MY2021: all HW3.
Model 3 Fremont MY2022: all HW3. Highland (Model 3 refresh) did not reach Fremont until 2024.
Model 3 Fremont MY2023: all HW3. The Highland refresh with HW4 was manufactured at Shanghai (starting Sept 2023) but did not reach Fremont production in MY2023.
Model 3 Fremont MY2024: Highland refresh introduced HW4. All MY2024 Model 3 from Fremont include HW4.
Model 3 Fremont MY2025: HW4 standard continues.
Model 3 Fremont MY2026: HW4 expected to continue. MEDIUM confidence as very recent.
Model 3 Shanghai (LRW WMI) MY2020: all HW3. HW4 not in production.
Model 3 Shanghai MY2021: all HW3.
Model 3 Shanghai MY2022: all HW3. Highland did not start until Sept 2023.

Model 3 Shanghai MY2023: maybe. Highland refresh began at Giga Shanghai in September 2023. Early-year (pre-Sept 2023) units are HW3; later units may be HW4. No reliable serial-range cutoff available. Check Software screen.
Model 3 Shanghai MY2024: all Highland with HW4. Full production year of the Highland refresh at Shanghai.
Model 3 Shanghai MY2025: HW4 standard continues.
Model 3 Shanghai MY2026: HW4 expected. MEDIUM confidence as very recent production.
Model S Fremont MY2020: all HW3. HW4 did not exist in production in 2020.
Model S Fremont MY2021: all HW3. Plaid refresh launched 2021 but still HW3.
Model S Fremont MY2022: all HW3.

Model S Fremont MY2023: maybe — LOW confidence. Community reports indicate Model S began receiving HW4 at some point during MY2023 production, but the serial-range boundary is not reliably documented. Whole-year maybe is the conservative choice.
Model S Fremont MY2024: expected all-HW4. MEDIUM confidence — less well-documented than Model 3/Y transitions.
Model S Fremont MY2025: HW4 continues.
Model S Fremont MY2026: HW4 continues. MEDIUM confidence as very recent.
Model X Fremont MY2020: all HW3. HW4 did not exist in production in 2020.
Model X Fremont MY2021: all HW3. Plaid refresh launched 2021 with HW3.
Model X Fremont MY2022: all HW3.

Model X Fremont MY2023: maybe — LOW confidence. Community reports suggest Model X began receiving HW4 during MY2023 similar to Model S. Serial-range boundary not reliably documented. Conservative whole-year maybe.
Model X Fremont MY2024: expected all-HW4. MEDIUM confidence.
Model X Fremont MY2025: HW4 continues.
Model X Fremont MY2026: HW4 continues. MEDIUM confidence as very recent.
